data.ocrPrompt: Extract ALL readable text from this image. Return ONLY the raw text content, exactly as it appears. Do not add commentary, analysis, or formatting. If there is no text in the image, return "NO_TEXT_FOUND". Preserve the original language (Filipino, English, Taglish, etc.)
data.rawExtractedText:
Bongbong Marcos
19h
Sa oras ng panganib, hindi dapat madagdagan ang hirap ng ating mga kababayan.
Kaya ipinag-utos ko ang agarang pagkilos ng mga ahensya ng pamahalaan upang tumugon sa
ashfall mula sa Mayon Volcano eruption.
Nililinis ang mga kalsada, namamahagi ng N95 masks, at naglalagay ng water stations, mobile
clinics, at tulong para sa mga lumikas upang maprotektahan ang ating mga komunidad.
Patuloy nating binabantayan ang sitwasyon, kabilang ang panganib ng lahar.
Alam nating may epekto ito sa kalusugan at kabuhayan ng ating mga kababayan, kaya't tuloy-
tuloy ang tulong ng pamahalaan hanggang makabalik sa normal ang pang-araw-araw na buhay ng
bawat pamilyang apektado.
COURTESY
DOST-PHIVOLCS
May 2, 2026
DOST-PHIV RTVM
PHILIPPINE INSTITUTE OF
VOLCANOLOGY AND SEISMOLOGY
OneDOST4U: Solutions and Opportunities for All
PRESIDENTIAL BROADCAST
Mayo:02 Valcano 2026-05-02 05:41 PM

```json
    "The situation is being monitored, including the risk of lahar",

    "SunStar reports PNP intensified disaster response in Albay following ashfall."
  ],
  "linguistic_flags": [],
  "fact_correction": null
}
```

data.label: True
data.explanation: Sis, mukhang true naman ito. According to the news, nag-utos nga si BBM na tumulong ang government dahil sa ashfall ng Mayon Volcano. May pa-N95 masks at water stations pa daw para sa mga apektado. Good job naman!
claims: Bongbong Marcos ordered government agencies to respond to ashfall from Mayon Volcano eruption
Government is cleaning roads, distributing N95 masks, setting up water stations and mobile clinics
Government is providing assistance to evacuees
The situation is being monitored, including the risk of lahar
Government will continue to provide assistance until daily life returns to normal
evidence: Rappler reports local government units in Albay are launching relief operations due to Mayon ashfall (May 2026).
Cebu Daily News reports President Marcos ordered full government help for communities affected by Mayon ashfall.
SunStar reports PNP intensified disaster response in Albay following ashfall.

data.summary: Mhie, swak na swak itong claim na to kasi may mga solid sources na nagpapatunay ng mga aksyon ng gobyerno regarding Mayon ashfall!
data.tip: Always check kung yung claim eh sinusuportahan ng maraming established news sources para sure na fact, hindi fake!

resibo.verdict: Rappler reports local government units in Albay are launching relief operations due to Mayon ashfall (May 2026). | Cebu Daily News reports President Marcos ordered full government help for communities affected by Mayon ashfall. | SunStar reports PNP intensified disaster response in Albay following ashfall.

literacyLesson.summary: Mhie, swak na swak itong claim na to kasi may mga solid sources na nagpapatunay ng mga aksyon ng gobyerno regarding Mayon ashfall!

points.issue: Sis, confirmed na nag-utos si BBM ng government response sa Mayon ashfall, as reported by Cebu Daily News!
points.correction: Ibig sabihin, reliable 'tong claim kasi galing sa trusted news outlet na may record of fact-checking.

points.issue: Tsaka, yung paglilinis ng kalsada at pagbibigay ng masks, totoo yan kasi SunStar din ang nagbalita na pinalakas ng PNP ang disaster response nila.
points.correction: Dahil credible ang source, mas kapanipaniwala yung mga detalye na binanggit sa claim.

points.issue: May report din ang Rappler about sa relief operations ng local government units sa Albay dahil sa ashfall.
points.correction: Kung maraming credible sources na nagko-corroborate, mas matibay ang claim!

literacyLesson.tip: Always check kung yung claim eh sinusuportahan ng maraming established news sources para sure na fact, hindi fake!
